metadata.title: Dementia population attributable fraction dashboard
metadata.model: Predicted dementia, MICE harmonized life-course model where available
metadata.importantCaveat: Interactive totals recombine communality-weighted population attributable fraction contributions for scenario exploration. They are not individual predictions and should not be read as causal effects without the original population attributable fraction assumptions.
metadata.fallbackCaveat: Country-specific adult/childhood population attributable fractions come from the childhood manuscript country table. Country-specific occupational population attributable fractions use the harmonized T15 risk ratios with country-specific prevalence and communality. Sex-specific dashboard layers use country-by-sex prevalence and communality where available; factors absent from country-by-sex tables fall back to the all-sex country or harmonized all-country value.
